summary: Kept #52238 as the live canonical non-security issue for the Feishu topic/OpenChat inbound routing bug. Routed #52342 to central security handling because the hydrated preflight marks it security-sensitive and review evidence describes possible DM-to-group policy/session misrouting. Kept #58537 related because it tracks a distinct outbound session-key mismatch. No close, merge, or fix PR actions are planned.

actions.reason: #52238 remains the best live non-security canonical tracker for the inbound Feishu topic/OpenChat routing bug.
Security-sensitive PR work is out of Clownfish mutation scope and should go to central OpenClaw security handling.
#58537 is in the same Feishu OpenChat family but is a distinct outbound routing follow-up, not a duplicate of #52238.
